mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, order_no, amount, status, pickup_type, pickup_no, reject_reason, create_time FROM `order` WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (user_id, order_no, amount, status, pickup_type, pickup_no) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{pickupType}, #{pickupNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS todayOrders, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS todayAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedOrders FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status != 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS yesterdayOrders, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS yesterdayAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedOrders FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND status != 5

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') AS date, IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM `order` WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND status != 5 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT od.drink_name AS drinkName, SUM(od.quantity) AS count FROM order_detail od INNER JOIN `order` o ON od.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 4 GROUP BY od.drink_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5
